title: Peruvian Chicken Massaman Dish
description: A unique Peruvian twist on the classic Thai Massaman curry, featuring chicken and rocoto peppers. Serve with relleno rice for a full meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
Add another tablespoon of oil to the skillet and add the rocoto peppers. Cook until tender, about 3 minutes.
Add the massaman curry paste and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the coconut milk, chicken broth, brown sugar, fish sauce, and soy sauce. Stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve with peruvian relleno rice and garnish with marvelous sauce, if desired.
Cook the relleno rice according to package instructions.
Heat the marvelous sauce in a small saucepan over low heat, until warmed through.
